description: Businesses facilitating illegal goods, controlled substances, or unlawful activity are prohibited.
Pornographic content, escort services, and exploitative adult businesses carry severe restrictions.
Unlicensed lending, unregistered investments, and opaque money movement models are frequently rejected.
Certain crypto services may require enhanced approvals and can trigger account restrictions if unclear.
Platforms processing funds for third parties need explicit marketplace compliance and underwriting.
Firearms, controlled healthcare products, nicotine, and certain supplements are tightly regulated.
Businesses with unclear billing, false claims, or hidden recurring charges face fast suspension risk.
